TravellerProfile.title: TravellerProfile
TravellerProfile.description: User profile containing travel settings, preferences, and authentication details.

country.description: The country of origin for custom recommendations.

preferredLanguage.description: The preferred language for localization and translator features.

travelInterests.description: List of categories of interest (e.g., Spiritual, Nature, Adventure).

budgetRange.description: The traveler's typical budget tier (Budget, Mid-Range, Luxury, Family).

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp representing when the user profile was established.

picture.description: The secure URL to the user's Google logo/picture.

googleConnected.description: Indicates if the account is verified through Google Auth.

users/{userId}.description: Profiles for authenticated travelers detailing their travel criteria.
